heading: Change an API (Application Programming Interface) Key's Roles
body:
To update an API key in an organization using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas organizations apiKeys assign <apiKeyId> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas organizations apiKeys assign](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-organizations-apiKeys-assign).
